bead.title: escalation: wire ladder into executor closure; drop tier→profile mutation
bead.description: Wire the ladder (S10_2) into singleTierAttempt / executor closure in execute_bead_loop.go. Drop the existing tier→profile mutation; ladder owns escalation. Currently each bead gets exactly one singleTierAttempt; this bead replaces that with a real loop that reads RoutingActual.Power from each attempt's response and bumps MinPower per the ladder for the next call. Also pass Role + CorrelationID on every ExecuteRequest (CorrelationID = bead_id:attempt_id; Role = 'implementer' for the implementation calls).
bead.acceptance: 1. execute_bead_loop.go uses ladder.Next on substantive failure. 2. Existing tier→profile mutation removed. 3. Each call carries Role + CorrelationID. 4. Tests in zero_config_escalation_integration_test.go (or new) exercise actual escalation, not just primitives.
